headline: Stay updated with the S&P500 stocks that are on the move in today's pre-market session.
summary: As the US market prepares to open on Thursday, let's get an early glimpse into the pre-market session and identify the S&P500 stocks leading the pack in terms of gains and losses.

headline: Arch Capital Group Ltd. to Report 2026 Second Quarter Results on July 28
summary: PEMBROKE, Bermuda, June 25, 2026--Arch Capital Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: ACGL) ("Arch" or the "Company") today announced it expects to release its 2026 second quarter results after the close of regular stock market hours on Tuesday, July 28. The Company will hold a conference call for investors and analysts at 10 a.m. ET on Wednesday, July 29.
